# Ruwen Ogien

*1947 – 2017 · French · [Analytic Philosophy](../movements/analytic-philosophy.md)*

French moral philosopher and advocate of a "minimal ethics": morality reduces to not harming others, with no duties to oneself and no moralism, against every form of paternalism.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
